items.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Amgen, Raises Price Target to $325
items.description: Wells Fargo  analyst Mohit Bansal   maintains Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $300 to $325.

items.title: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Maximize Your Retirement Income
items.description: The traditional ways to plan for your retirement may mean income can no longer cover expenses post-employment. But what if there was another option that could provide a steady, reliable source of income in your nest egg years?

items.title: AstraZeneca: A Rare Compound Growth Opportunity In Biopharma
items.description: AstraZeneca PLC is rated a Buy due to strong growth, prudent R&D reinvestment, low leverage and resilience. Learn more about AZN stock here.

items.title: Amgen: Improving Balance Sheet Is Bringing The Stock Close To Being A "Buy"
items.description: Amgen Inc. is at least fairly valued, with improving balance sheet metrics and a robust growth pipeline offsetting looming patent expirations.
